error.signature: Error: Edge Function size limit exceeded (1MB)

verdict.summary: Vercel Edge Function exceeds 1MB compressed size limit.

dead_ends.action: Use dynamic imports for code splitting
dead_ends.why_fails: Edge functions are bundled as single files - dynamic imports are resolved at build time.
Edge function size limit is a platform constraint and cannot be configured.

workarounds.action: Move heavy logic to serverless functions instead of edge
workarounds.how: Export from pages/api/ instead of middleware

workarounds.action: Replace large dependencies with lighter alternatives
workarounds.how: e.g. use date-fns instead of moment, or hand-rolled instead of lodash
